## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how?
     Describe the use case clearly. -->


## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.
     Include API changes, new config options, behavioral changes, etc. -->


## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution preferred? -->


## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, diagrams, links to related upstream projects or specs, etc. -->
